image_captions: This is the first image and the start frame of the video. It shows an upper corner of a room with a light wood cabinet featuring a glass door and blue trim along the top and bottom edges. The cabinet has two metal handles and is mounted on a white wall. To the right, a white doorway frame encloses a brown door. Below the cabinet, a gray surface is visible with two small hooks holding a striped item. The ceiling is white and meets the walls at a clean corner. The viewpoint is angled slightly downward from the upper left corner of the room, capturing both the cabinet and the doorway.

This is the second image in the sequence and is not the start frame of the video. It shows a bathroom with a white wall-mounted sink featuring a chrome faucet and a cabinet below, positioned under a mirror cabinet. To the right of the sink is a bathtub with a handheld showerhead mounted on the wall. A white door with a brass handle and keyhole is visible on the right side of the frame, slightly ajar. The floor is covered in gray tiles with black diamond-shaped accents. The walls are tiled in white, and the viewpoint is slightly elevated and angled from the left side of the sink, looking toward the bathtub and door.
